message:
fix: use subtle transparent hover backgrounds for sidebar icon buttons (#3762) (#3772)

Replace hover:bg-secondary and hardcoded bg-gray-800/bg-purple-900 with
transparent overlays (hover:bg-black/5 dark:hover:bg-white/10) so icon
buttons blend naturally with their parent background in both light and
dark themes.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
